---
id: play-bgm
title: "Play background music"
description: "Start playing background music from the specified mod asset. If BGM is already playing, it will be stopped and replaced."
sidebar_label: "Play background music"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/api/homunculus-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Play background music"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/audio/bgm"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Start playing background music from the specified mod asset. If BGM is already playing, it will be stopped and replaced.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
